examples: He had a rather forbidding, saturnine manner.
My former roommate was a saturnine scholar who said very little and smiled rarely.
Hugh Hungerford was slim and saturnine long-legged long-faced clad in faded finery.
Unfortunately for Mr Howard, who is charming in person but somewhat saturnine in public, too many people could see what Miss Widdecombe was getting at.
Simon Russell Beale plays Timon, a saturnine, white-haired, deep-pocketed sugar daddy.
